Description.text: Here you can find the daily prayer times & other dates/times that have an important status in Islam. Such as the times of:

List.last_third_of_night: The last third of the night

Fajr.time: The time of fajr today is at {time}.

Dhuhr.time: The time of dhuhr today is at {time}.

Asr.time: The time of asr today is at {time}.

Maghrib.time: The time of maghrib today is at {time}.

Isha.time: The time of isha today is at {time}.
